case_title: NEW CENTURY MANAGEMENT LLC VS. HUA QING CHEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW CENTURY MANAGEMENT LLC
